scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT 
    CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_vacunacion AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    CAST(fecha_vacunacion AS DATE) AS fecha,
    DATEPART(WEEKDAY, fecha_vacunacion) AS dia_semana,
    DATENAME(WEEKDAY, fecha_vacunacion) AS nombre_dia,
    DAY(fecha_vacunacion) AS dia_mes,
    MONTH(fecha_vacunacion) AS mes,
    DATENAME(MONTH, fecha_vacunacion) AS nombre_mes,
    DATEPART(QUARTER, fecha_vacunacion) AS trimestre,
    YEAR(fecha_vacunacion) AS anio,
    
    -- Aquí forzamos que el 1 o 0 se convierta en tipo BIT
    CAST(CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, fecha_vacunacion) IN (6, 7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS BIT) AS es_fin_semana
    
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_vacunacion AS DATE) AS fecha_vacunacion
    FROM silver.vacunaciones_consolidadas
    WHERE fecha_vacunacion IS NOT NULL
) s',
